home.truviaTitle: Truvia, our New Premium Piping Line
home.truviaSubtitle: ASME BPE-certified purity, European-grade performance, now locally available.
home.truviaFeature1Title: Certified to the Highest Global Standards
home.truviaFeature1Text: Manufactured in partnership with Ghwa and compliant with ASME BPE, ISO, 3-A Sanitary Standards, SMS, DIN, and BS.
home.truviaFeature2Text: Matches the durability and performance of leading European brands, with the advantage of local stock and support.
home.truviaFeature3Text: High-purity stainless steel tubes and fittings with surface finishes ranging from 32 μin (Ra) to 10 μin (Ra) to suit any application.
home.truviaFeature4Text: From tube fittings, clamps, and adapters to union parts, gaskets, hangers, and spray balls — everything you need under one trusted name.

home.faqSubtitle: Quick answers about the industries we serve, our services, standards, and how to get started.
home.faqContact: Still have questions? Contact our team
home.faqA1: MIDEX specializes in pharmaceutical, food & beverage, biotechnology, and cosmetics industries, delivering hygienic engineering systems built to meet the strict compliance standards each sector demands.
home.faqQ2: Does MIDEX handle both installation and maintenance of existing systems?
home.faqA2: Yes. Beyond new installations, MIDEX offers system upgrades and modifications — including purified water station and distribution skid modifications — to extend and enhance the performance of existing infrastructure.
home.faqQ3: What welding standards does MIDEX follow?
home.faqA3: MIDEX performs both manual and automatic orbital welding to hygienic and sanitary industry standards, ensuring weld integrity for critical purified water and process piping systems.
home.faqQ4: Can MIDEX supply components as well as install systems?
home.faqA4: Yes. Our product catalogue covers piping and fittings, valves, instruments, UV units, stainless steel tanks, pumps, filters, and hygienic drains — all sourced to meet hygienic industry specifications.
home.faqQ5: How does the project process start?
home.faqA5: Simply fill out our project request form. A MIDEX engineer will review your requirements and reach out within 24 hours to discuss the right solution for your needs.
home.faqA6: MIDEX serves clients across Egypt and the broader region, bringing the same hygienic engineering standards to every project regardless of location.
home.quoteText: Tell us about your project and our team will respond with pricing and lead times.

hero.slide1Title: Engineering the Systems That Keep Industries Pure
hero.slide1Text: Designing, welding, and installing hygienic systems for pharma, food & beverage, biotech, and cosmetics — with 15+ years of precision.
hero.slide2Text: Compliance with FDA, ISPE, ASME BPE, and EHEDG. Turnkey projects that provide reliable, efficient, and safe solutions for critical operations.
hero.slide3Text: From purified water stations to orbital welding and hygienic installations — validated systems built to GMP standards.

solutions.heroTitle: Engineering Solutions Built Around Your Process
solutions.heroSubtitle: From system upgrades to full hygienic installations, MIDEX delivers end-to-end engineering solutions tailored to pharmaceutical, food & beverage, biotechnology, and cosmetics production.
solutions.subtitle: Turnkey systems, modifications, welding, and installation services for hygienic process environments.

solutions.timelineSubtitle: A clear, structured approach from first consultation to final handover.
solutions.step1Text: We start by understanding your process, your facility, and your compliance requirements.
solutions.step2Text: Our engineers assess the site and design a solution matched to your exact specifications.
solutions.step3Text: From welding to installation, our team executes the project to hygienic and international standards.
solutions.step4Text: Every system is tested and validated before handover, ensuring full compliance and reliability.
solutions.step5Text: We stay involved post-installation, offering upgrades, modifications, and ongoing support as your needs evolve.
solutions.step6Text: Complete documentation, operator training, and formal project close-out — so your team is ready from day one.

about.title: Engineering Purity, Building Trust
about.subtitle: For over 15 years, MIDEX has designed and installed advanced piping systems and integrated solutions for the safe, hygienic transfer of liquids and gases — trusted by pharmaceutical, food & beverage, biotechnology, laboratory, and healthcare clients who demand precision.
about.intro: Midex for Integrated Projects and Contracting delivers validated engineering for pharmaceutical, food, and cosmetics industries across Egypt and the region.
about.storyText1: Midex is a specialized engineering company serving the pharmaceutical, food, and cosmetics industries. We design, build, and commission purified water systems, WFI storage and distribution, and hygienic process controls.
about.storyText2: From concept to qualification, our team delivers turnkey projects with the documentation, traceability, and support that GMP facilities require.
about.visionText: To be the leading provider of innovative and reliable engineering solutions for the pharmaceutical, food & beverage, and cosmetics industries — ensuring the highest standards of quality, safety, and efficiency in purified water generation and hygienic process systems worldwide.
about.missionText: To deliver exceptional turnkey engineering solutions by leveraging our expertise in purified water systems, hygienic process controls, and utility transfer pipelines — adhering to global standards such as FDA, ISPE, ASME BPE, and EHEDG, and exceeding client expectations at every stage.
about.milestonesSubtitle: From foundation to leadership — the numbers behind our journey.
about.milestone5: Complete sanitary drainage systems designed and installed
about.milestone6: Heated Vent Filters manufactured and delivered
about.founder1Bio: A mechanical engineer and co-founder of MIDEX, with expertise in stainless steel manufacturing, water treatment plants, production networks, and pipeline systems. Mohamed works closely with pharmaceutical, food, and cosmetics companies to deliver specialized solutions, leading complex projects with a strategic vision focused on quality and efficiency.
about.founder2Bio: A mechanical engineer and co-founder of MIDEX, with extensive experience in water treatment plants and hygienic production networks. Abdelrahman has led the company through numerous milestones, strengthening its market position through a strategic, innovation-driven approach to engineering services across pharmaceutical, food & beverage, and cosmetics industries.
about.standardsSubtitle: Every project we deliver adheres to the industry's most stringent regulatory frameworks.
about.standardsText: These are international compliance frameworks we design and document against — not partner companies or certifications we hold.
about.eventsIntro: Over the years, MIDEX has taken part in the industry's leading exhibitions and conferences, connecting with partners and clients shaping the future of pharmaceutical and hygienic engineering across the region.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide every project we design, build, and deliver.
about.value1Text: Every project is engineered and executed to exact specifications, with no room for shortcuts.
about.value2Text: We hold every system to the highest sanitary and regulatory standards, from FDA to ASME BPE.
about.value3Text: Our systems are built to perform consistently, project after project, client after client.
about.value4Text: We bring advanced techniques and technologies to solve our clients' most demanding engineering challenges.
about.value5Text: We work as an extension of our clients' teams, committed to their long-term operational success.
about.value6Text: One accountable partner from concept and FAT through commissioning, training, and after-sales support.
about.expertiseSubtitle: Integrated capabilities across utilities, process piping, and validated installations.
about.expertise1Text: RO, EDI, storage, and distribution loops designed for pharmaceutical-grade production.
about.expertise2Text: ASME BPE piping with manual and automatic orbital welding and full inspection records.
about.expertise3Text: Cleaning and sanitization systems with coverage testing and documented cycles.
about.expertise4Text: End-to-end project delivery — engineering, fabrication, installation, and commissioning.
about.certificationsSubtitle: Validated engineering, documentation, and quality systems aligned with global pharmaceutical and hygienic design frameworks.
about.certificationsFootnote: Documentation and validation records are available on request for qualified project inquiries.
about.cert1Desc: Pharmaceutical manufacturing and quality requirements for regulated facilities.
about.cert2Desc: Good engineering practice for pharmaceutical and biotech facility design.
about.cert3Desc: Bioprocessing equipment design standards for hygienic piping and components.
about.cert4Desc: European hygienic equipment design guidelines for food and pharma environments.
about.cert5Desc: Good Manufacturing Practice for validated production and documentation.
about.faqSubtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most about MIDEX.
about.faqA1: MIDEX serves pharmaceutical, food & beverage, biotechnology, laboratory, and healthcare clients — industries where hygienic quality and precision are essential.
about.faqQ2: How long has MIDEX been in the industry?
about.faqA2: MIDEX brings over 15 years of expertise designing and installing advanced piping systems and integrated hygienic solutions.
about.faqQ3: What standards does MIDEX comply with?
about.faqA3: Our projects adhere to global standards including FDA, ISPE, ASME BPE, and EHEDG.
about.faqQ4: What kind of projects has MIDEX delivered?
about.faqA4: Our track record includes complete purified water stations, station modifications and upgrades, production line improvements, sanitary drainage systems, and large-scale manufacturing and supply of components like filters and drains.
about.faqA5: MIDEX is led by Mohamed Samir and Abdelrahman Fouad, both mechanical engineers with deep expertise in water treatment plants and hygienic production networks.
about.ctaText: Discuss your project with our engineering team — from initial scope to validated handover.
